channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 21st March
item.description:
Hither Green Lane. Remove graffiti from bus shelter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 188, Hither Green Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Car damage re Pothole, 21st March
item.description:
This pothole is at the edge of the pavement where cars are allowed to mount the pavement. My car was damaged today as the car dipped into the hole as it was being parked. £500 minimal damage , new tyre, new wheel and scrape on bumper.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of huge amounts of clothing, 21st March
item.description:
Massive dump of unwanted clothes and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Matthias Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffetti on stone river stair Lambeth bridge steps south East side, 21st March
item.description:
Mad Dog sprayed on stone wall Lambeth Bridge steps to Albert Embankment South side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambeth Bridge, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete barrier destroyed, 21st March
item.description:
Concrete barrier destroyed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springvale Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekends Road full of rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
Can we have street cleaning 7 days a week. Weekends are horrible as we have car boot sales leftovers Saturday and Sunday and fast food containers some with food thrown . We have 2 schools on our short road and two churches and us a busy through way

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 21st March
item.description:
Abandoned car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car for a long time, 21st March
item.description:
Car left there abandoned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag dumped, 21st March
item.description:
A large bag has been dumped on the corner of Cross Mead and Court Road on the corner near the zebra crossing. It has been there about a week now and the contents is spilling on to the pavement. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossmead, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15 inch pothole, 21st March
item.description:
Pothole on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric car cable across pavement from 3 Chestnut Rise, 21st March
item.description:
Cable across pavements creates significant safety hazards. Special for older and/or disabled people.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chestnut Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bath dumped on Broad Lawn, 21st March
item.description:
A bath has been dumped by the kerb in the road on Broad Lawn just as you enter from Green Lane. It is partly blocking the road too so dangerous. Please can it be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 15 inch pothole, 21st March
item.description:
Pot hole on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Halfway Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large cracking on footpath, 21st March
item.description:
Alleyway pavement cracking been like it for couple of months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clovelly Way, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric cables exposed, 21st March
item.description:
Electrical cables exposed on pavement outside Blackheath Coffee Co. Potentially trip hazard or dangerous if was wet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Station Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked across entire pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Cars been parked across the entire pavement forcing people into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Raeburn Road, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on the drive wall in front of Jennings House on Old Woolwich Road, 21st March
item.description:
Great if you can paint over this. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge outside house, 21st March
item.description:
This fridge freezer has been dumped on the pavement outside 43 Ansdell Road. It’s been there for several days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ansdell Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole at least 1m long, 21st March
item.description:
Pothole extending at least 1m across road and deep (exaxt unsure). Has worsened with heavy rainfall. Have to swerve to avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Underpass, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zip Car Parking Spaces no longer in use, 21st March
item.description:
Zip Car no longer operates in London but the parking bays are taking up well needed parking spaces when half of Ridge Road is closed for Thames Water works.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
